title: Minimize Or Of Remaining Elements Using Operations
description: At most k times replace adjacent values by their bitwise AND; minimize the bitwise OR of the remaining array. Inputs use Python lists and integers; unless explicitly stated, callers need not preserve mutable inputs.
input_contract: Parameters in order: nums: list[int], k: int. 1 <= len(nums) <=100000; 0<=nums[i]<2^30; 0<=k<len(nums); each operation reduces length by one.
output_contract: Return integer using exact comparison. Python integer arithmetic has no 32-bit overflow; array/query order is significant.
